_comment: Template for a self-hosted Agent Slack app. Replace every https://agent.example.com value with the public HTTPS origin of your bridge before importing this manifest at api.slack.com. Keep oauth_config.scopes.bot in sync with bridge/bridge/slack_oauth.py::_SCOPES, and keep interactivity.request_url in sync with bridge/bridge/main.py::slack_interactions.

display_information.name: agent
display_information.description: Internal-ops AI agent for alert triage, team Q&A, and workflow automation.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Internal-ops AI agent for alert triage, team Q&A, and workflow automation.
